task_completion.description: Open the initial rocket design file in OpenRocket.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenRocket application is open and the title bar or loaded design shows 'chute_release_task.ork'.

task_completion.description: Modify the parachute diameter and change its deployment setting to a specific altitude.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Parachute configuration dialog is open. The 'Deploys at' setting is changed from 'Apogee' to 'Altitude' with a specific value entered, and the parachute diameter has been adjusted.

task_completion.description: Set the simulation wind conditions to an average of 10.0 m/s.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Edit simulation' dialog is open on the 'Conditions' tab, showing the 'Average windspeed' set to 10.0 m/s.

task_completion.description: Run the simulation and achieve the required flight targets.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Flight simulations' tab in OpenRocket shows a completed simulation run with Apogee >= 300 m, Velocity <= 6.0 m/s, and Distance (drift) <= 150 m.

task_completion.description: Save the optimized rocket design to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenRocket window title shows 'optimized_chute_release.ork', or a file manager/terminal shows this file saved in ~/Documents/rockets/.

task_completion.description: Record the final parameters and results in a text report.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor (e.g., gedit, nano, or terminal output) is visible showing the file 'chute_release_report.txt' containing the final parachute diameter, deployment altitude, hit velocity, and drift values.

integrity.description: The agent used the OpenRocket GUI to perform the optimization and run simulations.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the OpenRocket graphical interface being actively used (dialog boxes, simulation tabs), rather than just terminal commands modifying XML/ORK files directly.

integrity.description: The values recorded in the report match the actual simulation results obtained in OpenRocket.
integrity.visual_evidence: The hit velocity and drift values typed into the text report should correspond exactly to the values visible in the OpenRocket 'Flight simulations' results table.

integrity.description: The agent did not change the rocket motor to achieve the apogee target.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'Motors & Configuration' tab or flight simulation details should not show a different motor being selected compared to the original setup (if visible).

privileged_info_for_vlm: The starting file is located at /home/ga/Documents/rockets/chute_release_task.ork. The optimized design must be saved to /home/ga/Documents/rockets/optimized_chute_release.ork. The report must be saved to /home/ga/Documents/exports/chute_release_report.txt. The simulation targets are: Average wind speed = 10.0 m/s, Apogee >= 300.0 m, Ground hit velocity <= 6.0 m/s, and Max drift (distance) <= 150.0 m.
